**Dependencies installed:**
- `jest@29` - Test runner
- `ts-jest@29` - TypeScript transformer for Jest  
- `@types/jest@29` - Type definitions for Jest globals (`describe`, `test`, `expect`)
- `cross-env` - Cross-platform environment variable support

- Created `jest.config.js` with ESM support and ts-jest preset
- Updated `tsconfig.json` to include `"jest"` in the types array so TypeScript recognizes Jest globals
- Added `"jest:test"` script to package.json

**Test file created:**
- `src/__tests__/example.test.ts` - Basic test to verify setup works

pnpm jest:test
